programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Notorious Nun
programme.desc: Father Thomas ONeil Timothy Bottoms is murdered and a nun Sister Margaret Michele Greene with whom he was rumoured to be having an affair is arrested as the suspect in the scandalous crime Perry Mason Raymond Burr now a judge is asked by his pal Archbishop Stefan Corro to look into it With not only Mason but his secretary Della Street Barbara Hale and his recent investigative partner Paul Drake Jr William Katt on the case Margarets name may be cleared

programme.title: Perry Mason The Case of the Telltale Talk Show Host
programme.desc: Dr Sheila Carlin is good friends with Della who calls Perry in when she is being pestered by someone On the theory that it could be somebody that she works with at a radio stations she arranges Perry to be interviewed by Winslow Keene who is also the stations owner Winslow enrages the rest of the talk show hosts on the station by informing them of changes that he is making to their time slots That night Winslow is shot by a hit man hired by someone at the station and Sheila is set up for the murder She calls in Perry and as usual Perry Della and Ken swing into action to find out who really did it

programme.title: TBH 105
programme.desc: TBH 105

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S06E17
programme.desc: Petticoat Junction S06E17

programme.title: Munsters 124
programme.desc: Munsters 124

programme.title: Addams 201
programme.desc: Addams 201

programme.title: Love Boat 125
programme.desc: Love Boat 125

programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: A big-game hunter resentful of Tracy whom he blames for closing off land to his lifes passion forces the doctor to walk through wild territory on foot hoping to prove that he will have to kill an animal to survive

programme.title: 3 10 to Yuma
programme.desc: 3 10 to Yuma

programme.title: Utah
programme.desc: Misunderstanding what her ranch is worth Dorothy Bryant sells the land for far less than its value so it is up to Roy to somehow get it back

programme.title: Man from Music Mountain
programme.desc: When nasty land developers try to bilk honest ranchers who dont know their land holds lots of gold Gene puts a stop to it

programme.title: Rough Riders Round Up
programme.desc: Now that the Spanish-American war is over Roy and other Rough Riders become border patrolmen Their goal is to stop outlaws who are stealing gold from stagecoaches and express offices

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 7 Fractured Fairy Tales Jack and the Beanstalk Peabodys Improbably History Ponce De Leon Rocky Bullwinkle Box Top Robery Part 8

programme.title: The Bullwinkle
programme.desc: The Bullwinkle

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Charley and Floyd derail the Cannonball going around Deadmans Curve They believe the reason for the derailment was that Floyd had removed too many of the railroad ties to stoke the engine Floyd counters that he only took those that were deteriorating because of the worm holes

programme.title: Petticoat Junction S04E07
programme.desc: Selma is even less cordial to Kate than usual Based on Selmas purchases at Druckers and her implication Sam and Kate surmise that Selma is beautifying Henrietta to snag a husband with that probable target being the valleys new eligible bachelor who happens to have a bright and seemingly lucrative aviation future namely Steve Theyre right as Selma tries to throw both money into Steves crop dusting business and gourmet meals to entice Steve Despite Billie Jo and Steve now officially dating Kate vows to stay out of the matter

programme.title: TBH 217
programme.desc: TBH 217

programme.title: TBH 132
programme.desc: TBH 132

programme.title: Munsters 221
programme.desc: Munsters 221

programme.title: Munsters Pilot
programme.desc: Munsters Pilot

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: An escaped convict Marc Alaimo returns home to retrieve the money he hid from a bank robbery and discovers his son is bitter and his wife Sheree North has lost her mind Later a couple Chris Nash Ruth de Sosa illegally adopts a baby but as the little girl Irina Cashen grows her new parents come to the realization that she may be evil

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A bum displays his ability to resurrect himself

programme.title: Tales from the Crypt
programme.desc: A hooker learns that beauty is only skin deep

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Loud arrogant and obnoxious criminal Trout feels a strong kinship with and develops an immediate affinity for nerdy mild-mannered and soft-spoken serial killer Wax However the close bond between these two radically contrasting lunatics falls apart after the pair pick up a brash prostitute

programme.title: The HItchhiker
programme.desc: Deranged Peter relentlessly stalks and terrorizes Teresa a lovely young lady who Peter thinks is his ex-wife Melissa Peter frightens Teresa out of her wits by playing a series of cruel jokes on her

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric working in a Mom-and-Pop diner has to save the day when a gang of bikers show up to terrorize Mom Pop and a pretty customer Soups on werewolf style

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric sets out after Janos Skorzeny following the rumors of a Bigfoot sighting After a ferocious battle with a stronger werewolf Eric finds sanctuary in the home with a woman named Mary who has a strange and supernatural secret of her own

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: Nick tries to stop drinking blood but falls off the wagon and must fight his urges to go on a murderous spree

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Micki Ryan and Jack track down a cursed scalpel that has found its way into the hands of a talented surgeon

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A big-game hunter arrives on the island Upon learning there is nothing on the island to hunt he chooses instead to hunt one of the castaways--and he chooses Gilligan

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: An ape man wreaks havoc on the island and frightens the castaways who dont realize that he is actually a Hollywood actor preparing for a role

programme.title: Real McCoys S03E22
programme.desc: Real McCoys S03E22

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E32
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E32

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: As a crazy Army officer Max tries to prove that a psychiatrist is passing on confidential information to KAOS

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: CONTROL must track down the secret journal of a retired secret agent

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: BJ is tricked into returning to Orly County where hes quickly arrested and imprisoned by the unscrupulous Sheriff Lobo BJ and his fellow falsely accused prisoners plot a jailbreak and a mad dash for the county line

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: Hogans 228
programme.desc: Hogans 228

programme.title: Hogans 324
programme.desc: Hogans 324

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Parker and the Crew scheme to get McHale chosen for a War Bond tour of The States but when they find out that they wont be included they must cook up another plan to get McHale off the hook

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Gruber has been selling Fujis Polynesian dishes to the Taratupa personnel and trouble develops when Binghamton - Having sampled the delicious food - Insists that it be served at a dinner for a visiting Admiral

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: While on a hike Gomer makes a friend but when the friend decides to move into the barracks Sgt Carter wants him gone! but Gomer shows the Sgt what an asset this new friend is to the platoon

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: After tipping his hat instead of saluting female Captain Iron Pants Martin Gomer is assigned special detail in her office to teach him a lesson But it turns out that he is the teacher instead of the student as he reminds her that she is more then just a Marine

programme.title: Hong 107
programme.desc: Hong 107

programme.title: Hong 108
programme.desc: Hong 108

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Gadget and Penny are in Italy However Cheif Quimby gives Gadget an assignment It tells him that DrClaw is planning on stealing a priceless artifact known as the Golden Pizza However Gadget has to join an opera to find and stop the MAD agents from stealing the Golden Pizza Plus another agent is planning to use his singing plant to help DrClaw steal the Pizza Gadget must stop DrClaw from stealing the Golden Pizza and destroy the singing plant

programme.title: Inspector Gadget
programme.desc: Quimby suspects that MAD may try to use a powerful sneezing weapon against Metro City

programme.title: Love and Bullets
programme.desc: Arizona cop is sent to Switzerland to bring in the girlfriend of a dangerous mobster so she can testify against him The mobster sends someone too - assassins

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.desc: Isaac overhears mystery writers researching a book and thinks theyre plotting to kill Merrill A rock star falls for a deaf woman Docs honeymooning friend Mitzi thinks her new husband Vinnie doesnt really love her

programme.title: WKRP 106
programme.desc: WKRP 106

programme.title: WKRP 109
programme.desc: WKRP 109

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: After another on-field humiliation Wood quits as football coach and opens a sporting goods store

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Will wants a rare racing set for Christmas and Herman manages to find itfour hours away He and Wood set out on Christmas Eve to get it and find themselves stranded when their car breaks down

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Boss unveils his new ally His college-educated nephew Hughie Hogg Hughie turns out to be even more corrupt than his uncle proving it with a scheme to frame Uncle Jesse in a car-stripping ring

programme.title: Hercules 205
programme.desc: Hercules 205

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Earth Final Conflict

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: In the midst of the post apocalyptic future the team decide to throw a birthday party for Debi Meanwhile the Morthren attempt to locate their malfunctioning seeing-eye device a self-controlled drone which has run amok through the city

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Arcanes emerald-making machine threatens Columbias monopoly on the precious gems bringing him to the governments notice But his greed hides a deeper and more sinister agenda

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Swamp thing finds some eggs in the swamp and this makes him start dreaming about when he was human and was in love

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: The moon is approaching a black hole Professor Bergman is a able to rig up an energy shield around the moonbase but Commander Koenig feels this is only a desperate measure and has an eagle with six personnel dispatched as the rest of the moonbase await certain death

programme.title: Stryker
programme.desc: The worlds water supply has dried up due to some sort of apocalypse A beautiful woman holds the secret to where one of the last springs being guarded by a group of Amazons A Road Warrior like crew captures her and tries to make her talk through brutal torture The hero Styrker unites with some of the remaining good guys and the Amazons and frees the woman

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: Young 311
programme.desc: Young 311

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: A 12-year-old girl knows her stepfather murdered her mother But her attempts to unmask him only impede the polices investigation

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: Rogosh is an operative for a country hostile to the United States When he strikes he typically leaves dozens if not hundreds of bodies in his wake Rogosh has been spotted in Los Angeles But he will not crack under normal interrogation methods Briggs comes up with an unusual plan The IMF stages an accident where pedestrian Rogosh is struck by a car When he awakes he appears to be in a prison in his home country -- three years later

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The police academy are accepting applications from people who want to join the police force Friday and Gannon help with the interview process

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday Gannon talk to community members to improve relations between police and public They suggest people call them to find the truth of incidents instead of spreading rumors A couple complains they were stopped because of their race

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E15
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E15

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: 25 men have died in a cave-in at the Dutton Mine in which the Barkleys have a 40 interest Heath on his way to meet Nick and investigate the disaster is badly wounded-and mistaken by the vengeful townspeople as an avenging mine payroll robber

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: When Cheyenne visits Jim ONeil in Texas he learns he is to hang the next day Jim refuses to give Cheyenne any details nor did he defend himself at his trial Against Jims wishes Cheyenne investigates the situation to save his friend

programme.title: The Octagon
programme.desc: A martial artist must defeat a plan by ninjas to create a worldwide training camp for terrorists

programme.title: Cannonball
programme.desc: Racing across the country from LA to New York a plethora of exotic cars carry contestants hoping to win a very large sum

programme.title: Wheels on Meals
programme.desc: Thomas and David who own a mobile restaurant save a thief Sylvia with the help of their detective friend Moby As a result they find themselves pitted against an evil gang

programme.title: Ator the Fighting Eagle
programme.desc: The son of Torren learns of his heritage goes to avenge the deaths of his fellow villagers and rescue his sister from the evil Dakkar and his spider cult

programme.title: The Incredible Hulk Returns
programme.desc: Hopefully on the verge of curing his Hulk condition Banner meets his colleague Don Blake who is mystically linked to a Viking warrior Thor

programme.title: American Flyers
programme.desc: Marcus takes his kid brother David with him for a physical test and a brain scan suspecting cerebral aneurysm like their dad died of They head off on bikes for the big Rockies bike race with Marcus Sarah driving the van

programme.title: No Retreat No Surrender
programme.desc: After his father is abused by some thugs a teenager considers Bruce Lees spirit as his teacher Later he trains to become a martial arts professional to avenge his fathers humiliation

programme.title: Filler
programme.desc: Filler

programme.title: 315 the Moment of Truth
programme.desc: The Cobras a vicious street gang rule an embattled high school with their violent brand of terror But theyre headed for a showdown when an ex-gang-member-gone-good challenges their brutal reign

programme.title: Badge of the Assassin
programme.desc: Three black revolutionaries gun down two New York City police officers The subsequent investigation puts a white assistant DA and a black police detective on the trail of the killers that leads from New York to San Francisco and down to New Orleans

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: An escaped convict Marc Alaimo returns home to retrieve the money he hid from a bank robbery and discovers his son is bitter and his wife Sheree North has lost her mind Later a couple Chris Nash Ruth de Sosa illegally adopts a baby but as the little girl Irina Cashen grows her new parents come to the realization that she may be evil

programme.desc: Teenage Halloween pranksters Shari Belafonte-Harper LeVar Burton Lee Montgomery revive a 300-year-old witch and some of her ghoul friends

programme.title: Psycho II
programme.desc: As a child Kevin was kidnapped by Freddy Krueger before Freddy was killed by a mob of angry parents

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: Invitation to Hell
programme.desc: A family moves to a suburban town only to be coerced into joining a suspicious club

programme.title: House II The Second Story
programme.desc: A man Arye Gross and his friend Jonathan Stark exhume an ancestor Royal Dano in the house where his parents were killed

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Every athlete has their own unique way to be the best. We focus on the details of their training and why they think they have been successful. Gain insight on the featured athlete from their coaches and training partners - as well as the athlete themselves - about preparing for their sport. What do they bring to the sport as individuals - and what do they gain by being at the top of their game? Featuring Dale Tallman

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Professional and Amateur fighters from across North America battle it out in Hard Knocks' cage. Tyrone Halkett v. Travis Favel.

programme.desc: Alexey Makhno v. Michel Silva

programme.desc: Wisniewski’s development as a fighter was a family affair, as he and his brother watched tapes of MMA battles then trained in the front yard. Oganov honed his skills in Serbia, while enrolled in the Red Army.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: A private pre-season event held in a secret warehouse in Budapest, Hungary, the inaugural Karate Combat: Genesis event took place on February 3, 2018. The event showcases the incredible depth of the fight roster highlighting many karate legends in various weight classes, competing for the first time ever in this new sporting league.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Erivan Pereira v. Ariom Damkovsky

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Dalgiev Khamzat v. Dragan Pesic

programme.title: Hard Knocks
programme.desc: Ultimate Warrior Challenge is one of Europe's leading MMA shows, since it's inception in 2006 it's has grown steadily and delivered some of the most exciting MMA fights Europe has seen, with a truly Internationalfight roster, UWC has built a solid reputation for bringing some of the Worlds toughest fighters to square off in the UWC octagon, fighters from the UK, USA, Brazil, Sweden, Italy, Africa, Poland, France, Cyprus, Greece have all fought in the UWC cage. UFC stars such as Simeon Thoreson, Luke 'Bigslow' Barnatt, RiccoRodriguez,Thierry "The African Assassin" Sokoudjou, Phil De Fries, Paul Kelly to name but a few, have graced the UWC cage. UWC continues to grow and to bring the fight fans across Europe the fights they want to see.

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: The Herculoids

programme.title: The Herculoids
programme.desc: Neron captures the Herculoids to fight gladiatorial battles in his arenaThe Temple of Trax seems to be abandoned In reality the high priest has a plan to kidnap Tara and sacrifice her for the return of Trax after 2000 years

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: The root which only responds to Audric or something belonging to him reacts to the Planet Xiang which leads Jayce and Herc there even though it is a planet controlled by Saw Boss They discover a message from Audric on a vase but before they can get it it is stolen Jayce and Herc and Oon are drawn further into the city where Saw Boss has laid a trap for Jayce Jayce and Oon fall into a pit which is slowly being consumed by fire; but Herc Gillian and Flora come to the rescue Safely aboard the Pride they decode the message which is revealed to be too old to be of much use

programme.title: Jayce and the Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Gillian tells the story of Valroth a powerful weapons maker who made living armor to protect his people many years ago But the armor became too powerful and it was all destroyed except for the helmet Jayce seeks the helmet finds it and after putting it on his power is invincible He easily defeats some monster minds But the helmet is wicked and it takes over Jayces body Jayce and the power of light conquer the evil helmet and then they destroy it

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Two boys find a mock-up of a Space Shuttle in the Everglades VENOM is after the actual thing Alex Sector takes over as MASK leader after Matt Trakker is bitten by a snake

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: A cursed knight named Dekion tricks the kids into retrieving a Circle of Power for Venger The Circle can be used for good or evil and its up to Dekion to make that choice

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: Bobby is bitten by a poisonous creature and an antidote can only be found at the garden of queen Zinn Will his friends be able to find it in time and convince the queen to give them the cure
